flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Rio Grande rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.9k → $18.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at University of Rio Grande vs the 2003–2007 baseline (32.2% vs 39.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Rio Grande fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Rio Grande rose 76% between 2006 and 2009 (9.7% → 17.0%).
